title: Watchtower at the Pass
target: commission a new watchtower at the southern pass before winter closes the road

contributions.line: Veska meticulously drafts the structure, relying on her sharp intelligence to ensure it withstands the spring melt.
Marek keeps a wary eye on the crew, his soldier's discipline trying to mask his fatigue as he insists the timber remains true.

outcomeNarrative: The crew's efforts are divided; Veska's precise design is sound, but Marek's oversight falters under fatigue, leading to a shaky build that might not hold through winter.
